---
title: "Thi Thuy Dung (Jun) Nguyen"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.png
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 25em

  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dnguyentt/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/junnguyentt
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/dnguyen-td
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jun.nguyen@nhh.no

editor: visual
---

## Welcome!

Jun is an Assistant Professor of Accounting at NHH Norwegian School of Economics, Norway. She holds a Ph.D. in Accounting from Universidad Carlos III de Madrid, Spain.

Her primary area of interest is archival auditing. Her current research considers how regulatory information, market incentives, and auditor communication shape auditor behavior and audit market outcomes. She is also interested in advanced econometrics and frontier data science methods in auditing research, including advancing her existing knowledge of textual data analysis and machine learning methods.

She loves cooking, traveling, building Lego and drawing in Procreate.

## Education

<p class="custom-subtitle">

<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Ph.D. in Business and Finance (Accounting track)** \| July 2024

</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle2">

Universidad Carlos III de Madrid, Spain

</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle">

<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Visiting scholar** \| Nov 2022 - Mar 2023

</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle2">

University of Florida, United States

</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle">

<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Master in Business and Finance** \| Sep 2020

</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle2">

Universidad Carlos III de Madrid, Spain

</p>

## Work Experience

<i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Assistant Professor in Accounting** \| Aug 2024 - present \| NHH Norwegian School of Economics, Norway

<i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Lecturer in Accounting** \| Nov 2016 - Sep 2018 \| Ho Chi Minh City University of Law, Vietnam

<i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **General accountant** \| Apr 2015 - Oct 2016 \| BIDV, Vietnam

<i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Audit assistant** \| Jan 2014 - Apr 2015 \| Mazars, Vietnam

<i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill" style="color:#124559;"></i> **Intern accountant** \| Apr 2013 – Sep 2013 \| Thien Minh Consultancy Limited Company, Vietnam
